headlines.title: Your blood pressure reading contains a hidden number — and here’s why it matters
headlines.description: You’re likely familiar with getting your blood pressure taken, the cuff squeezing your arm before generating two numbers.

headlines.title: After years of failed treatments, this psych program finally worked. Now her family owes $1 million.
headlines.description: A specialized psychiatric treatment program helped this 24-year-old with her complex OCD. Now, her family owes the facility more than $1 million.

headlines.title: GLP-1 overdoses increase at an alarming rate as weight loss drugs become easier to buy online
headlines.description: Within 24 hours of injecting the first dose of a weight loss medication she received following a visit with a telehealth doctor, Karleigh McClain was admitted to the hospital, she said

headlines.title: New spotlight on CTE after hockey legend's death by suicide
headlines.description: After hockey star Claude Lemieux's death, his family decided to donate his brain to Boston University’s CTE Center, which could help future generations of hockey players. NBC News' Dr. Akshay Syal reports.

headlines.title: Leadership vacuum plaguing U.S. health agencies
headlines.description: A wave of firings and resignations at the highest levels of the CDC and the FDA suggests the Trump administration may be pivoting away from facets of the "Make America Healthy Again" movement. NBC News' Aria Bendix reports.

headlines.title: 100-Year-Old World War II Veteran Attends His First Prom
headlines.description: When student volunteers found out that 100-year-old Ray Svejnoha missed his high school prom because he was called to military service during World War II, they decided to make things right and invite him to their special dance. WMAQ’s Regina Waldroup reports.

headlines.title: How to Build Muscle and Boost Longevity With the POWER Method
headlines.description: Dr. Joseph Herrera, a rehabilitation medicine physician at Mount Sinai Health System, joins TODAY to share how to effectively build muscle with the POWER method and breaks down why it is so beneficial for longevity.

headlines.title: Is this $178 bra actually life-changing?
headlines.description: I tested the Forme Power Bra for five months to see if it could improve my posture and back support. Here’s what actually happened.

headlines.title: The best running watches, tested over hundreds of miles
headlines.description: I’ve tested dozens of running watches from Garmin, Coros, Amazfit, Fitbit, Apple and more. Here are my top picks for beginners, races and ultra-athletes alike.

headlines.title: The best men’s walking shoes of 2026, tested and reviewed
headlines.description: Shop expert-recommended and staff-tested men’s walking shoes from Brooks, On, New Balance and Hoka.

headlines.title: I’ve tested dozens of workout headphones: These are the best
headlines.description: I tested over a dozen workout headphones from brands like Apple, Beats, and Shokz to find our top picks for running, biking, the gym and more.

headlines.title: Tracking the Ebola outbreak: Where the deadly virus is spreading
headlines.description: Learn more about the deadly 2026 Ebola outbreak, including how many cases there are so far, which countries are most affected, how this outbreak compares with others in severity and more.
